name: Skillet Pasta with Shrimp Scallops & Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 small Zucchini, cut into thin strips
1 (9 oz.) pkg. fresh angel hair pasta, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10- or 12-inch skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add zucchini, peppers, and onion. Stir to coat with oil.
3. Cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are crisp-tender, 3 to 5 minutes.
4. Add parsley, clam juice, cream, and scallops. Cook, stirring occasionally, until scallops are just opaque, about 3 minutes.
5. Add shrimp and heat through, 1 minute.
6. Season with salt and cayenne.
7. Spoon sauce over hot cooked pasta.
